title: Adventurous Crispy Pork Ribs
description: A rich and adventurous Peruvian dish featuring vegan-friendly pork back ribs, seasoned with a unique tadka spice mix for an extra kick of flavor.

ingredients.name: Vegan Tadka Spice Mix
ingredients.notes: Contains spices like cumin, coriander, and turmeric for a unique flavor profile

ingredients.name: Coconut Milk
ingredients.notes: To glaze the ribs for a rich, creamy coating

instructions: Season the pork back ribs generously with the vegan tadka spice mix and garlic paste.
Brush both sides of the ribs with olive oil.
Wrap the lime leaves around each rib to infuse them with their aromatic essence.
Place the seasoned ribs on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, making sure they do not touch.
Bake in the preheated oven for 2 hours. Every 30 minutes, baste the ribs with coconut milk to glaze and add richness.
Remove from the oven when the ribs are tender and golden brown on the outside.
Let the ribs rest for a few minutes before serving.
